parameters.query:
SELECT id, agent, rec_type, data, priority, status, created_at
FROM recommendations
WHERE tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'executed')
ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
         created_at DESC
LIMIT 30;

SELECT cash, burn_rate, runway_months, alert_level, safe_budget, currency, calculated_at, warnings
FROM treasury_snapshots
WHERE tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_leads,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE routing = 'hot') as hot_leads,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE routing = 'warm') as warm_leads,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'replied') as replied_leads
FROM leads
WHERE tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days';

SELECT COUNT(*) as stuck_count, SUM(amount) as stuck_value
FROM deals
WHERE tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND status = 'open'
  AND days_in_stage >= 10;

SELECT content, metadata FROM memory_chunks
WHERE tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND metadata->>'type' = 'brief_pattern'
ORDER BY (metadata->>'outcome_score')::int DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 2;

meta.description: UC8+9: aggregates week data, Claude synthesizes brief, validated, delivered to Slack + stored.
